title: Hippeastrum paranaense

intro: Hippeastrum paranaense, also known as the Parana amaryllis, is a species of flowering plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its showy, trumpet-shaped flowers and glossy, green leaves. Research has shown that the extracts of Hippeastrum paranaense possess various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and support immune function.
